title: Why Inventing General Relativity Is the Final Test for AI - Adam Brown
summary: Adam Brown discusses general relativity invention as a proposed ultimate test for AI capabilities. The framing suggests that achieving this scientific breakthrough would represent a decisive milestone in demonstrating artificial general intelligence.
